@Piercinggazeofthemoon this kpop group does it for the trans girls, I mean can't you see all the light blue light pink and white in this teaser? Also the lyrics of I'm real "let's awake a real girl" and other lyrics "it's a new beginning nobody expected" kinda like a trans woman finally waking up from her gender reassignment surgery and starting her life again like a real woman, in the whole No Filter music video Dain is always wearing trans flag colors and also all the members are pretty much aliens that sort of choose to have a girl appearance. At the end of the day these are all fictional people so they can be headcanoned as anything like any fictional media character could, but I know the people behind this group are real and still they liked one of my comments saying trans rights so clearly they know who trans people and support them
